title: Senior Software Engineer - Atos India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Atos India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!
